description: You are a QA Engineer and Developer at a SaaS company. Your team has written a complete test suite for a new `log_analyzer` Python utility that processes Apache Combined Log Format access logs (like the NASA 1995 dataset). The test suite defines the contract, but the actual implementation files only contain stubs that raise `NotImplementedError`. Implement the 5 modules (`parser.py`, `analyzer.py`, `filter.py`, `reporter.py`, `alerter.py`) in `/home/ga/workspace/log_analyzer/log_analyzer/` so that the provided test suite passes. You must handle edge cases like `-` for sizes in the log file and ensure numerical types are returned where expected. Success is achieved when all tests pass without hardcoded dummy returns.

metadata.occupation: Software Quality Assurance Analyst / Software Developer
